query:
制作一个公众号文章封面。
标题：染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香
主题：染秋香氛新品发布
构图方法：中心构图。
风格：高级质感风。
要求：突出标题。
比例：900x500

final_prompt.prompt:
制作一个公众号文章封面。
标题：染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香
主题：染秋香氛新品发布
构图方法：中心构图。
风格：高级质感风。
要求：突出标题。
比例：900x500

Create a marketing poster (WeChat Official Account article cover) for a fragrance new product launch titled "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香".

Style/medium: high-end editorial flat design, refined and luxurious texture aesthetic, muted autumn tones with subtle material depth
Composition: centered composition, title text as the dominant visual anchor, generous negative space framing the center, balanced symmetry
Subject: fragrance product launch visual for "染秋", with the headline "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the primary typographic element, supported by minimal decorative motifs evoking autumn — fallen leaves, soft mist, or amber botanicals
Scene/backdrop: abstract or softly textured background suggesting autumn atmosphere — warm amber, deep ochre, or dusty rose gradients with subtle organic texture
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm light, gentle and nostalgic, evoking the slow passage of autumn afternoons
Color palette: warm amber and ochre as dominant tones, muted dusty rose or sage as secondary, off-white or cream for text contrast
Materials/textures: fine paper grain or silk-like surface texture on background, delicate translucent botanical overlays
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title text must be prominently legible and visually dominant; layout must work as a 900×500 horizontal article cover; no busy background competing with headline
Avoid: overly saturated colors, generic stock photo autumn leaves, cluttered layout, drop shadows that cheapen the luxury feel, watermark

Use case: editorial-cover
Asset type: WeChat Official Account article cover banner, 9:5 horizontal crop
Primary request: autumn-themed fragrance new product launch cover with prominent title text
Scene/backdrop: soft autumnal atmosphere — fallen leaves, warm amber haze, subtle bokeh depth
Subject: elegant fragrance bottle or abstract autumn elements as supporting visual; title text as hero element
Style/medium: high-end editorial illustration / luxury brand visual, refined and atmospheric
Composition/framing: centered composition, title text anchored at visual center, balanced negative space on both sides
Lighting/mood: warm golden-hour diffused light, soft and luxurious, gentle glow around text
Color palette: deep amber, burnt sienna, champagne gold, soft ivory — rich autumnal tones
Materials/textures: silky smooth gradients, delicate leaf textures, subtle matte paper feel
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title text must be the dominant focal point; layout must suit 900×500 banner format; no human figures
Avoid: cluttered background, overly saturated colors, generic stock-photo look, watermark

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为「染秋香氛新品发布」生成一张公众号文章封面，比例 900×500（横版）。

风格/介质:高级质感平面设计，克制而精致的品牌视觉语言，哑光纸质感，秋日氛围
构图:中心构图，标题文字置于画面正中，四周留出均匀留白，视觉重心稳定
主体:标题文字"染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"作为核心视觉元素，字体大而醒目，搭配香氛瓶或秋叶等极简装饰图形作为点缀
场景/背景:抽象秋意背景，可用渐变色块或模糊落叶纹理，营造温暖静谧的秋日氛围
光线/氛围:柔和漫射光，无强烈阴影，整体氛围温润、高级、留白感强
色彩搭配:以暖金色、深琥珀色、米白色为主色调，深色文字与浅色背景形成清晰对比，突出标题可读性
材质/纹理:哑光纸感背景，轻微颗粒纹理，局部可有烫金或压纹质感暗示
文字(原文保留):"染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
约束:标题文字必须是画面最突出的视觉元素，清晰易读；整体构图适配 900×500 横版封面比例
避免:过度装饰、杂乱元素堆砌、低对比度导致文字难以辨认、廉价渐变、卡通风格
